paper.title: Experimental noise filtering by quantum control

implemented_equations.modulation: y(t) = +/- 1 with sign flips at pi pulses
implemented_equations.filter: Y(omega) = integral_0^T y(t) exp(i omega t) dt
implemented_equations.dephasing: chi(T) = integral S(omega) |Y(omega)|^2 d omega / pi

assumptions: The benchmark treats pure dephasing noise only.
Pi pulses are instantaneous and ideal.
The synthetic spectrum is chosen to show both low-frequency filtering and narrow-band sensitivity.
This is a model reproduction, not a digitized experimental figure.
